name: proof-engine
description: Create formal, verifiable proofs of claims with machine-checkable reasoning. Use when asked to prove, verify, fact-check, or rigorously establish whether a claim is true or false.

skills.name: proof-engine
skills.description: Create formal, verifiable proofs of claims with machine-checkable reasoning. Use when asked to prove, verify, fact-check, or rigorously establish whether a claim is true or false -- mathematical, empirical, or mixed. Trigger phrases: 'is it really true', 'can you prove', 'verify this', 'fact-check this', 'prove it', 'show me the logic'. Do NOT use for opinions, essays, or questions with no verifiable answer.
